task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Nintendo Switch OLED (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $349.00 and wholesale is $244.00. Product features: Hybrid gaming console with 7" OLED screen and enhanced audio. Reference: https://www.nintendo.com/switch/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Nintendo Switch OLED. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Nintendo Switch OLED. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
